title: My Hero Academia Custom GUI Pack
description: My Hero Academia Custom GUI Pack
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/Qh2yVTZ.png) **It's GUI ONLY Resource pack so you can freely use it with other resource packs. Just place it on top of resource pack you use.** ****This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Boku no Hīrō Akademia" or otherwise known as "My Hero Academia". Don't hesitate to comment down below , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you** **enjoy. The** **palette that I choose is Yellow & Blue but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Red & white or any colors else.**** **please tell me I will think about it!** **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Images** **Hud** **![](https://i.imgur.com/bYOXSZi.png)** **Settings** **![](https://i.imgur.com/zQFQ3ri.png)** **Anvil** **![](https://i.imgur.com/qPKmi0t.png)** **Crafting Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/pYOoVVA.png) ** **Furnace** **![](https://i.imgur.com/UkMX4yx.png)** **Stone cutter** **![](https://i.imgur.com/qlfJghQ.png)** **Cartography Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/333jyK0.png)** **Brewing Stand** **![](https://i.imgur.com/lhhi6qp.png)** **Shulker Box** **![](https://i.imgur.com/hi6OsS3.png)** **Smithing Table** **![](https://i.imgur.com/O9gxjBo.png)** **Grindstone** **![](https://i.imgur.com/vo91lL3.png)** ****Enchantment**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/DREVE7L.png)**** ****Loom**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/vH3HRBA.png)**** ****Beacon Menu**** ****![](https://i.imgur.com/5EzVNjD.png)**** ****Villager** **Trading Menu**** ![](https://i.imgur.com/fqX85ID.png) [**![](https://i.imgur.com/n6lVJOX.gif)**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listarmc.com/) **Check Out Our Relaunched Website For More Content By Clicking The Image Above !!** [**![](https://i.imgur.com/H6j1NeD.png)**](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) ****Join the discord by clicking the image**** [![Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com](https://cdn.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.buymeacoffee.com/listarMc) **Thank you for your support ! ❤**
